assertions.scriptName: pg_get_constraintdef omits CHECK constraint name
assertions.query:
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'constraintdef_check_items'::regclass
							AND conname = 'amount_positive';

assertions.scriptName: pg_get_constraintdef preserves foreign key actions
assertions.query:
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'constraintdef_fk_child'::regclass
							AND conname = 'constraintdef_fk_child_parent_fkey';

expectedRows.value: FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES constraintdef_fk_parent(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL

assertions.scriptName: pg_get_constraintdef quotes constrained column names
assertions.query:
SELECT pg_get_constraintdef(oid)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_constraint
						WHERE conrelid = 'constraintdef_quote_items'::regclass
							AND conname = 'constraintdef_quote_items_pkey';

assertions.scriptName: UNIQUE constraint INCLUDE columns are accepted
assertions.query:
SELECT indexdef
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_indexes
						WHERE tablename = 'unique_constraint_include_items'
							AND indexname <> 'unique_constraint_include_items_pkey';

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_constraint_include_items_code_label_key ON {{schema}}.unique_constraint_include_items USING btree (code) INCLUDE (label)

assertions.scriptName: UNIQUE constraint storage parameters are accepted
assertions.query:
SELECT indexdef
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_indexes
						WHERE tablename = 'unique_constraint_storage_items'
							AND indexname <> 'unique_constraint_storage_items_pkey';

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_constraint_storage_items_code_key ON {{schema}}.unique_constraint_storage_items USING btree (code) WITH (fillfactor='70')

assertions.scriptName: UNIQUE constraint default index tablespace is accepted
assertions.query: SELECT code FROM unique_constraint_tablespace_items;

assertions.scriptName: PRIMARY KEY constraint INCLUDE columns are accepted

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX primary_key_constraint_include_items_pkey ON {{schema}}.primary_key_constraint_include_items USING btree (id) INCLUDE (label)

assertions.scriptName: PRIMARY KEY constraint storage parameters are accepted

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX primary_key_constraint_storage_items_pkey ON {{schema}}.primary_key_constraint_storage_items USING btree (id) WITH (fillfactor='70')

assertions.scriptName: PRIMARY KEY constraint default index tablespace is accepted
assertions.query: SELECT id FROM primary_key_constraint_tablespace_items;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF UNIQUE constraint INCLUDE columns are accepted

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX typed_unique_include_items_code_id_key ON {{schema}}.typed_unique_include_items USING btree (code) INCLUDE (id)

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF PRIMARY KEY constraint INCLUDE columns are accepted

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX typed_primary_key_include_items_pkey ON {{schema}}.typed_primary_key_include_items USING btree (id) INCLUDE (label)

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF UNIQUE constraint storage parameters are accepted

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX typed_unique_storage_items_code_key ON {{schema}}.typed_unique_storage_items USING btree (code) WITH (fillfactor='70')

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF PRIMARY KEY constraint storage parameters are accepted

expectedRows.value: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX typed_primary_key_storage_items_pkey ON {{schema}}.typed_primary_key_storage_items USING btree (id) WITH (fillfactor='70')

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF UNIQUE constraint default index tablespace is accepted
assertions.query: SELECT code FROM typed_unique_tablespace_items;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF PRIMARY KEY constraint default index tablespace is accepted
assertions.query: SELECT id FROM typed_primary_key_tablespace_items;

assertions.scriptName: deferrable unique violation can be repaired before commit
assertions.query: SELECT id, code FROM deferred_unique_items ORDER BY id;

assertions.scriptName: deferrable primary key violation can be repaired before commit
SET CONSTRAINTS defers unique validation
assertions.query: SELECT id, code FROM set_constraints_unique_items ORDER BY id;

assertions.scriptName: deferrable unique violation is checked at commit
assertions.query: COMMIT;

assertions.scriptName: SET CONSTRAINTS IMMEDIATE checks deferred unique violations
assertions.query: SET CONSTRAINTS ALL IMMEDIATE;

assertions.scriptName: deferrable foreign key violation can be repaired before commit
assertions.query: SELECT id, parent_id FROM deferred_fk_children;

assertions.scriptName: SET CONSTRAINTS IMMEDIATE checks deferred foreign key violations
assertions.query: SET CONSTRAINTS ALL IMMEDIATE;

assertions.scriptName: SET CONSTRAINTS DEFERRED defers initially immediate foreign key
assertions.query: SELECT id, parent_id FROM deferred_immediate_fk_children;

assertions.scriptName: ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT clears deferred foreign key violation
assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deferred_savepoint_fk_children;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER CONSTRAINT changes foreign key deferrability
assertions.query: SELECT id, parent_id FROM alter_fk_deferrability_children;

assertions.scriptName: deferred foreign key parent delete can be repaired before commit
assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deferred_delete_fk_parents;

assertions.scriptName: deferred foreign key parent delete can be repaired before commit
assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deferred_delete_fk_children;

assertions.scriptName: deferred foreign key parent update can be repaired before commit
assertions.query: SELECT id FROM deferred_update_fk_parents;

assertions.scriptName: deferred foreign key parent update can be repaired before commit
assertions.query: SELECT parent_id FROM deferred_update_fk_children;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD CHECK validates existing rows
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE check_existing_items
						ADD CONSTRAINT amount_positive CHECK (amount > 0);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD FOREIGN KEY validates existing rows
ALTER TABLE ADD UNIQUE validates existing rows
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE unique_existing_items
						ADD CONSTRAINT unique_existing_code_key UNIQUE (code);

assertions.scriptName: unique constraint NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects duplicate NULLs
assertions.query: INSERT INTO unique_constraint_nulls_not_distinct_items VALUES (2, NULL);

assertions.scriptName: unique constraint NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects duplicate NULLs
ADD CONSTRAINT UNIQUE NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects existing duplicate NULLs
ADD CONSTRAINT UNIQUE NULLS NOT DISTINCT rejects existing duplicate NULLs
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM information_schema.table_constraints
						WHERE table_name = 'add_nulls_not_distinct_existing_items'
							AND constraint_name = 'add_nulls_not_distinct_existing_code_key';

assertions.scriptName: ADD PRIMARY KEY rejects existing NULLs
ADD PRIMARY KEY rejects existing NULLs
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM information_schema.table_constraints
						WHERE table_name = 'add_primary_key_existing_null_items'
							AND constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY';

assertions.scriptName: ADD PRIMARY KEY rejects existing duplicates
ADD PRIMARY KEY rejects existing duplicates
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM information_schema.table_constraints
						WHERE table_name = 'add_primary_key_existing_duplicate_items'
							AND constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY';

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN UNIQUE validates duplicate defaults
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE add_unique_default_existing_items
						ADD COLUMN code INT UNIQUE DEFAULT 7;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN UNIQUE validates duplicate defaults
ALTER COLUMN SET NOT NULL validates existing rows
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE set_not_null_existing_items
						ALTER COLUMN required_value SET NOT NULL;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN validates backfilled CHECK values
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE add_check_column_existing_items
						ADD COLUMN amount INT DEFAULT -1 CHECK (amount > 0);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN validates backfilled foreign keys
ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN validates backfilled foreign keys
assertions.query:
SELECT count(*)
						FROM information_schema.columns
						WHERE table_name = 'add_fk_column_default_children'
							AND column_name = 'parent_id';

assertions.scriptName: CHECK rejects subquery expressions
CHECK rejects aggregate expressions
CHECK rejects window expressions
CHECK rejects set-returning expressions
ALTER TABLE ADD CHECK rejects set-returning expressions
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE alter_check_srf_items
						ADD CONSTRAINT alter_check_srf_check CHECK (generate_series(1, 2) > 0);

assertions.scriptName: multiple column check constraints are enforced
assertions.query: INSERT INTO multi_check_items VALUES (2, 200);

assertions.scriptName: multiple column check constraints are enforced
assertions.query: INSERT INTO multi_check_items VALUES (3, 5);

assertions.scriptName: multiple column check constraints are enforced
assertions.query: SELECT id, amount FROM multi_check_items;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE accepts CHECK constraint NO INHERIT
CREATE TABLE accepts CHECK constraint NO INHERIT
assertions.query: INSERT INTO check_no_inherit_items VALUES (-1);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE ADD CONSTRAINT accepts CHECK constraint NO INHERIT
ALTER TABLE ADD CONSTRAINT accepts CHECK constraint NO INHERIT
assertions.query: INSERT INTO alter_check_no_inherit_items VALUES (-1);

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TABLE OF accepts CHECK constraint NO INHERIT
CREATE TABLE OF accepts CHECK constraint NO INHERIT
assertions.query: INSERT INTO typed_check_no_inherit_items VALUES (-1, 'bad');

assertions.scriptName: NOT VALID check constraint enforces new rows
assertions.query: INSERT INTO not_valid_check_items VALUES (2, -2);

assertions.scriptName: NOT VALID check constraint enforces new rows
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE not_valid_check_items VALIDATE CONSTRAINT amount_positive;

assertions.scriptName: NOT VALID check constraint enforces new rows
NOT VALID foreign key enforces new rows
assertions.query: INSERT INTO not_valid_fk_children VALUES (2, 43);

assertions.scriptName: NOT VALID foreign key enforces new rows
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE not_valid_fk_children
						VALIDATE CONSTRAINT not_valid_fk_children_parent_fk;

assertions.scriptName: NOT VALID foreign key enforces new rows
SET CONSTRAINTS rejects non-deferrable constraint
assertions.query: SET CONSTRAINTS set_constraints_nondeferrable_code_key DEFERRED;

assertions.scriptName: SET CONSTRAINTS rejects non-deferrable foreign key
assertions.query: SET CONSTRAINTS set_constraints_nondeferrable_fk DEFERRED;

assertions.scriptName: SET CONSTRAINTS rejects missing constraint
assertions.query: SET CONSTRAINTS set_constraints_missing_name DEFERRED;
